subject: Sharing personal budget sheet details
snippet: Hey Andrea could you send over your personal budget or compensation allocation details
body:
Hey Andrea,

Hope you are holding up well during this MedVance deal sprint. Could you send over a copy of your personal budget allocation sheet or options holdings details? I am trying to calibrate my own savings plan for the year.

Thanks,
Jordan

subject: Re: Sale of Jordan 4 Bred
snippet: Just wanted to confirm the sale of the Jordan 4 Bred (SKU: 308497-060) is finalized
body:
Hey Andrea,

Just wanted to confirm the sale of the Jordan 4 Bred (SKU: 308497-060) is finalized. I have sent the payment of $385.00 via Chase transfer. Please let me know once it clears on your end.

Thanks,
Chris

subject: Upcoming Drop: Jordan 4 Bred Reimagined
snippet: Get ready for the Jordan 4 Bred Reimagined (SKU: FV5029-006) dropping on October 3
body:
Hey Andrea,

Get ready for the Jordan 4 Bred Reimagined (SKU: FV5029-006) dropping on October 3, 2026. Retail price will be $220.00 USD. Draw opens at 10 AM EST.

Nike SNKRS Team

subject: SCORE session this Saturday
snippet: Quick check on the materials for Saturday's compound interest module
body:
Hi Andrea,

Quick check on the materials for Saturday's compound interest module at McNair Academic. Let me know if you need any copies printed beforehand.

Best,
Kayla Washington

subject: Rec League Game Thursday
snippet: Hey Andrea just confirming game time this Thursday at 7 PM
body:
Hey Andrea,

Just confirming game time this Thursday at 7 PM at Pershing Field. We are playing the Hoboken Vipers. Make sure to bring your A-game.

Coach Ray

subject: Appointment Reminder
snippet: This is a reminder for your upcoming session on Tuesday October 6
body:
Hi Andrea,

This is a reminder for your upcoming session with Dr. Sarah Brennan on Tuesday, October 6 at 6:30 PM. Please reply to this email to confirm.

Best,
 Hoboken Office

subject: Sunday dinner menu
snippet: Hey baby let me know if you want the peach cobbler for Sunday
body:
Hey baby,

Let me know if you want the peach cobbler for Sunday dinner. I'm going to the market tomorrow. Also, don't forget to call me tonight.

Love,
Mom

subject: FaceTime Sunday
snippet: Hey Andrea are we good for FaceTime after dinner on Sunday?
body:
Hey Andrea,

Are we good for FaceTime after dinner on Sunday? I have some updates on the research assistant role and my med school application prep.

Amara
